items.title: Sources: ahead of US midterms, Democrats have been advised not to antagonize a ~$300M pro-AI lobby; internal polling shows broad support for tougher AI rules (Financial Times)

items.title_en: Sources: ahead of US midterms, Democrats have been advised not to antagonize a ~$300M pro-AI lobby; internal polling shows broad support for tougher AI rules (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：在美国中期选举之前，民主党人被建议不要与大约 3 亿美元的支持人工智能游说团体对抗；内部民意调查显示对更严格的人工智能规则的广泛支持（金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 资料来源：在美国中期选举之前，民主党人被建议不要与大约 3 亿美元的支持人工智能游说团体对抗；内部民意调查显示对更严格的人工智能规则的广泛支持（金融时报） / Sources: ahead of US midterms, Democrats have been advised not to antagonize a ~$300M pro-AI lobby; internal polling shows broad support for tougher AI rules (Financial Times)

items.title: Global smartphone shipments fell 4.1% YoY in Q1, the first decline since 2023, amid a memory chip crunch; Samsung's shipments grew 3.6% and Apple's grew 3.3% (IDC)
items.title_original: Global smartphone shipments fell 4.1% YoY in Q1, the first decline since 2023, amid a memory chip crunch; Samsung's shipments grew 3.6% and Apple's grew 3.3% (IDC)
items.title_en: Global smartphone shipments fell 4.1% YoY in Q1, the first decline since 2023, amid a memory chip crunch; Samsung's shipments grew 3.6% and Apple's grew 3.3% (IDC)
items.title_zh: 由于存储芯片紧缺，第一季度全球智能手机出货量同比下降 4.1%，这是 2023 年以来的首次下降；三星出货量增长 3.6%，苹果增长 3.3% (IDC)
items.title_bilingual: 由于存储芯片紧缺，第一季度全球智能手机出货量同比下降 4.1%，这是 2023 年以来的首次下降；三星出货量增长 3.6%，苹果增长 3.3% (IDC) / Global smartphone shipments fell 4.1% YoY in Q1, the first decline since 2023, amid a memory chip crunch; Samsung's shipments grew 3.6% and Apple's grew 3.3% (IDC)
